---
title: "Amsterdam by Day and Night"
subtitle: "Amsterdam · May 2026"
categories:
  - Travel
  - Architecture
  - Cityscape
  - Amsterdam
date: "2026-05-23"
image: "images/great_crested_grebe.JPG"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    lightbox: true
---

A day wandering the canals and a converted prison turned university, then back out along the IJ after dark.

### By Day

::: {layout-ncol=3}

![*Great Crested Grebe with Catch*](images/great_crested_grebe.JPG){group="amsterdam" fig-alt="A great crested grebe swimming with a fish in its beak"}

![*Canal in Bloom*](images/canal_flowers.JPG){group="amsterdam" fig-alt="White and orange flowers in the foreground with an Amsterdam canal and houses behind"}

![*Windmill on the Canal*](images/windmill.JPG){group="amsterdam" fig-alt="A traditional Dutch windmill at the end of a tree-lined canal"}

![*\"This Prison Has the Best Escape Plan\"*](images/prison_uni_sign.JPG){group="amsterdam" fig-alt="A banner reading 'This Prison Has the Best Escape Plan: A Degree' outside SRH Haarlem University of Applied Sciences"}

![*Inside the Old Prison*](images/prison_uni_stairs.JPG){group="amsterdam" fig-alt="A spiral staircase inside a converted prison building, now part of a university"}

:::

### By Night

::: {layout-ncol=2}

![*Illuminated Steps*](images/light_stairs.JPG){group="amsterdam" fig-alt="Glowing steps along a waterfront promenade at night"}

![*A'DAM Tower at Night*](images/night_tower.JPG){group="amsterdam" fig-alt="The illuminated crown of the A'DAM Tower against a dark night sky, reflected in the water"}

![*Skyline at Dusk*](images/skyline.JPG){group="amsterdam" fig-alt="Silhouetted skyline glowing under an orange dusk sky with a bird flying overhead"}

![*The Crew*](images/group_selfie.JPG){group="amsterdam" fig-alt="A group selfie taken from above with several people looking up at the camera at night"}

:::
